name: Cascade Limousine Svc
principals: Michael Jacobson (per WA UTC filing, separate Monroe address)
recent_news: Yelp lists 'Cascade Executive Services Inc' at the same 446 Spring Ln, Sedro Woolley address as CLOSED (updated March 2026); WA UTC shows a 'Cascade Limousine Service' as Unregulated charter/excursion with primary contact Michael Jacobson at a Monroe WA address - likely a different/unrelated entity.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee limo operator with strong signal the Sedro Woolley address is a CLOSED business (Cascade Executive Services Inc). No evidence of school district contracts or special-needs student transport. Skip.

name: Encinitus Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web footprint found under either 'Encinitus Limousine' or 'Encinitas Limousine' at the Oceanside CA address; not listed among active Oceanside/Encinitas limo operators in directory searches. Name appears to be a likely misspelling of 'Encinitas' but no matching live business surfaced.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Sub-scale 2-employee limo operator with no discoverable web presence, no school district contracts, no fleet evidence. Even if active, too small to move the needle as a Summit tuck-in. Skip.

name: A-1 Affordable Wheelchair Co
principals: Nancy Short (per public profile, listed as principal/operator since 2009; business acquired Jan 2014)
districts_or_customers: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools (CMS Transportation Office referral relationship per company profile)
recent_news: Operating as A-1 Wheelchair Patient Transport in greater Charlotte; ~17 years in business; ownership transition noted in public filings (started 2009 by Nancy Short, business acquired 2014); explicitly lists 'School and special needs' transport as a service and directs CMS families to request them via CMS Transportation.
fit_notes: Marginal fit. Independent, long-tenured NEMT/wheelchair operator with documented CMS special-needs school transport relationship and possible succession dynamics (founder ~17 yrs in). Too small standalone (2 employees) but could be a bolt-on to a NC SPED platform; not a meaningful standalone tuck-in for Summit.

name: ATC Transport Inc
recent_news: BBB profile opened 9/11/2015, Not Accredited / Not Rated; multiple addresses tied to the name in Pineville (321 A S Poke St, 201 College St, 12101 Egglestone Dr) with conflicting phone numbers across directories; no evidence of school-district contracts or NEMT/special-needs work surfaced in public search.
fit_notes: Not a fit on current evidence. 2-employee Pineville NC operator with no verifiable school-bus or SPED footprint and inconsistent listings suggesting a very small or possibly inactive shell. Skip unless rep flags otherwise.

name: Alaska Mobility Transit LLC
principals: Craig Porter (principal, per D&B / public records, tied to 2850 Greenscreek Cir address)
recent_news: Incorporated in Alaska Oct 2014; SDVOSB/VOSB-certified; active federal contractor with most recent award dated Sept 22, 2025; State of Alaska-certified NEMT provider. No explicit school-district or SPED student-transport contracts surfaced.
fit_notes: Not a meaningful fit. Independent SDVOSB NEMT/wheelchair operator focused on VA/DoD/Medicaid, not K-12 yellow-bus or SPED routing. AK geography also outside Summit's core platform footprint. Pass.
